description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dev with concurrency set to build. The workflow triggers on push to master and release/* branches and on pull requests to these branches. It has three jobs: build, test, and publish. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, logs in to Docker Hub, and builds a Docker image. The test job depends on build, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, pulls the Docker image, builds and runs tests with Docker, and dumps Docker logs on failure. The publish job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-latest if not a pull request, checks out the code, logs in to Docker Hub, and builds and pushes a Docker image to Docker Hub.
